title: Adicea crassifolia

The classification of Adicea crassifolia is as follows: it belongs to the kingdom Plantae, the clade Angiospermophyta, the class Magnoliopsida, the order Gentianales, the family Rubiaceae, the subfamily Rubioideae, the tribe Vanguerieae, and the genus Adicea.
